purpose: Approved simulation-first scope for a solo academic/demo project with no field deployment claim.

approved_forecast_inputs.scope: offline demo, contract tests, baseline evaluation and GCN-LSTM training only

approved_scenario_inputs.scope: offline SUMO scenario training and synthetic uncertainty/OOD calibration only

prohibited_forecast_inputs.reason: vision images are not 5-minute network time series
annual US CO2 inventory is not ambient Vietnam sensor data
frames must be converted to approved 5-minute aggregates before forecast use
independent detector-training images are not chronological network observations and cannot supply speed without tracking and geometric calibration

surrogate_policy.reason: Training becomes eligible only after the versioned SUMO scenario dataset passes the synthetic demo validation gate.

demo_acceptance: versioned synthetic 5-minute volume and speed aggregates
production_deferred_requirements: field-calibrated SUMO demand, speed and signal plans
